home: Zhang Zeduan, *Along the River During the Qingming Festival* (detail), 12th century
media-studies: Édouard Manet, *A Bar at the Folies-Bergère*, 1882
art-appreciation: Pieter Bruegel the Elder, *The Peasant Wedding*, 1567
representation: Kitagawa Utamaro, *Two Women by a Bamboo Blind*, c. 1797
calendar: Pieter Bruegel the Elder, *The Hunters in the Snow*, 1565
tone-and-form: Peter Paul Rubens, *Head of a Boy (Nicolaas Rubens)*, c. 1619
mark-making: Peter Paul Rubens, *Anatomical Studies*, pen and ink, c. 1605
composition: Clara Peeters, *Still Life with Cheeses, Almonds and Pretzels*, c. 1613
drawn-from-life: Ilya Repin, *Portrait of a Russian Peasant*, 1871
the-great-wave: Gustave Le Gray, *The Great Wave, Sète*, 1857
sea-of-steps: Frederick H. Evans, *A Sea of Steps, Wells Cathedral*, 1903
st-pauls-spires: Alvin Langdon Coburn, *St. Paul's and Other Spires*, c. 1909
canon-de-chelle: Timothy O'Sullivan, *Ancient Ruins in the Cañon de Chelle*, 1873
lincoln-cathedral: Frederick H. Evans, *Lincoln Cathedral From the Castle*, 1898
girl-with-washington: Southworth & Hawes, *Girl with Portrait of George Washington*, c. 1850
cloud-sequence: Alfred Stieglitz, *Music: A Sequence of Ten Cloud Photographs, No. 1*, 1922
articles-of-glass: William Henry Fox Talbot, *Articles of Glass*, 1844
yosemite-mosquito-camp: Eadweard Muybridge, *Valley of the Yosemite, from Mosquito Camp*, 1872
yosemite-rocky-ford: Eadweard Muybridge, *Valley of the Yosemite, from Rocky Ford*, 1872
lissitzky-schwitters: El Lissitzky, *Kurt Schwitters*, c. 1924 — a photomontage portrait of the great collagist
rubens-title-page: Peter Paul Rubens, title-page design for *Obsidio Bredana*, 1626
impossible-bouquet: Ambrosius Bosschaert the Elder, *A Still Life of Flowers*, 1609–10 — flowers that never bloom together, composed anyway
